routes.name: Skilled Worker Visa
eligibility_criteria: Job offer from a UK employer with a valid sponsor licence
Role must be at RQF Level 3 or above (Product Manager qualifies)
Minimum salary of GBP 38,700 or the 'going rate' for the role, whichever is higher
English language proficiency at B1 CEFR level or above
Must have enough savings to support yourself (at least GBP 1,270)

routes.name: Global Talent Visa
eligibility_criteria: Endorsement from Tech Nation (for digital technology)
Evidence of exceptional talent or exceptional promise in tech
No job offer required — can work flexibly
Highly competitive — requires strong portfolio of achievements

routes.name: Graduate Visa (if applicable)
eligibility_criteria: Must have completed a degree at a UK university with Student visa
Allows 2 years of work (3 years for PhD) with no restrictions
Not applicable if candidate did not study in the UK

required_qualifications: Bachelor's degree in any field (Business, Engineering, or Technology preferred)
3-5 years product management experience for mid-level, 5+ for senior
Experience with agile methodologies and product lifecycle management
language_requirements: English — native or near-native proficiency required
IELTS 6.0+ overall (or equivalent) for Skilled Worker Visa
credentials.degree_equivalency_notes: Indian degrees from UGC-recognised universities are accepted. UK ENIC (formerly NARIC) provides official equivalency statements. B.Tech/MBA from reputed institutions are well-regarded.

market_demand.scale_definition: Scale: low | medium | high | very_high — based on job posting volume, employer sponsorship willingness, and shortage occupation list inclusion. 'medium' = steady demand for the role but competitive market; not on shortage occupation list.
